zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Gorges於大約1302年出生在英國時，她的父親Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baron20歲，母親Eleanor24歲。她於大約1320年之後與Sir Robert de Ashton 1st在英國藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1348年享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Gorges于大约1302年出生在英国时，她的父亲Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baron20岁，母亲Eleanor24岁。她于大约1320年之后与Sir Robert de Ashton 1st在英国藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1348年享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gorges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Claus, Erwin, Heinz, Otto, Wilhelm.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of various places in France named with Old French gorge ‘gorge, ravine’ (see Gorge 2).

variants.name: Gorge
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in a deep valley, from Old French gorge ‘gorge, ravine’ (from Old French gorge ‘throat’), or a habitational name from any of various places in France named with this word.
English: variant of   Gorges   2 or   George  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Gorges was born about 1302, in England, her father, Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baron, was 20 and her mother, Eleanor, was 24. She married Sir Robert de Ashton 1st after about 1320, in Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1348, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Gorges est née environ 1302, à Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baron, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Eleanor, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert de Ashton 1st après environ 1320, à Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1348, à l’âge de 47 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Gorges è nata il circa 1302 nel England, sua padre, Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baron, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Eleanor, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert de Ashton 1st dopo il circa 1320, nel Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1348, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Gorgesが約1302年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baronは20歳，母Eleanorは24歳であった。約1320年以後にイギリスランカシュアイアアシュトン-ウンデル-リンでSir Robert de Ashton 1stと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1348年に47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Gorges(이)가 대략 1302년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baron(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1320년 이후 영국 랭카실르 애슈토-운더-리니에서 Sir Robert de Ashton 1st(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1348년 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Robert de Ashton 1st após aproximadamente 1320, em Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1348, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Gorges родилась около 1302 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baron было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert de Ashton 1st после около 1320 г. в местности аштон-ундир-лин, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1348 г. в возрасте 47 лет.
